title: 有馬記念の後に・本物の祭り

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black's running is full of intensity and
power. She's thrown everything she's got against
her senior opponents.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Yo, Kitasan! You sure put the "festive" in
"festival"! This party's rocking!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Thanks so much, Golshi! You ran great!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Do you hear that? Those cheers are deafening...

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
That's the roar of our festival, right there. You
don't get this level of hype at any ol'—

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, have you heard? It sounds like there'll be a
special concert this year, separate from the
winning concert.

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
They're only doing this program this time, huh?
Man, they're really pulling out all the stops.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Say whaaat?! A special concert? Are they trying
to ramp up the excitement outside of a race?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, I'm in! If they think it can hype people up
even more than our running, then let's see it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the URA hosts a special concert, and it's
a resounding success.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Whoooa-ho-ho!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Yes! YEEESSS! This is the festival I've been after all this time! Yeaaah!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: A'ight, time to hang up the cleats.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I'm quitting racing today. Starting next year, I'm
gonna start living my life as a singer!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Oooooh! You there, singer lady! Take me in as
your student!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! Sh-she's says she's gonna quit racing! We
have to stop Golshi!
choice_data_list:
Don't stress about her... She'll be back before
you know it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship acts on every whim that pops into her
head. Worrying about her is a waste of time and
energy.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oh... good point. Thanks, Trainer. I just realized
she'll probably get bored and come back soon
too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Kitasan Black has gotten used to her
antics as well. Just then...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Well done, Kita. That was an incredible Arima
Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
That was the best festival ever, wasn't it? I think I
was only able to do so well because of how
excited the crowd was, though.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I don't think I would've been able to do all that
on my own. Not right now, anyway. But...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'll be even stronger next year, and it'll be
because you'll be running right alongside me, Dia,
just as strong.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I know we'll be able to pull off the ultimate
festival with our combined power.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Yes... Hey, Kita? Why don't we do that thing we
always do when we make a promise?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: What we always do? Oh, do you mean...

text_block_list.name: Young Dia
text_block_list.text: You mean it? Like, you really, really mean it?

text_block_list.name: Young Kitasan
text_block_list.text:
Haha! Yeah, I promise! We can even pinkie
promise on it!

text_block_list.name: Young Dia
text_block_list.text: Pinkie promise? What's that?

text_block_list.name: Young Kitasan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you don't know? Well, it's like... we hook our
little fingers together like this...

text_block_list.name: Young Kitasan
text_block_list.text:
Then, we say, "Cross my heart and hope to die."
They're like magic words to make sure we keep
our promise! Does that make sense?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: ...I pinky promise you, then.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I promise I'll win a G1 race no matter what and
meet you at the Arima Kinen, Kita.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Dia...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I promise too! I'm going to become even bigger
and stronger and wait for you to catch up!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Okay, then...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Let's do it!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan and Dia
text_block_list.text:
Cross my heart and hope to die. Together
forever, you and I!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Boom, boom!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though time has passed, they are still bound by
their unchanging promise.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Their bond is unshakable. Though they were once
separated, their dream will reunite them as one
next year.
